g.text: FABIO wages per item for Austria (AUT) — a FABIO-internal decomposition; the World Bank reference is
TOTAL-only, so no WB line is drawn. Blue line/triangles on the Primary (ISIC-A) row(s) = external A01+A03
wages benchmark (EUROSTAT_NAMA; exported by scripts 02/03), a primary-agriculture, forestry-free reference
for the covered years. Items grouped as "Other" exactly as in the TOTAL figure (below 3% max |share| of WB
across years). Rows: primary (ISIC-A) vs processing (ISIC-C).
